source: Greenbarz · Curated from General Index · Dubai partials trade flows
note: Aggregated counterparty volumes in the Dubai partials window. Sellers sum + buyers sum should approximately match (representing total bilateral trade count). Refresh weekly.

context.sellers_lead: Unipec dominates the sell side (121 partials) — Chinese state-trader acting as primary supplier of Mideast crude to the international window.
context.buyers_lead: Total leads buy side (82) followed by Vitol (50) and Trafigura (24) — major European refiners and traders absorbing the flow.
context.trade_signal: When Unipec's sell share spikes above ~60%, it usually signals China is destocking strategic reserves or Chinese refiners are unprofitable on Mideast crude. Watch this ratio for cracks in Asian demand.
